title: Address clippy warnings from rust 1.95 update across workspace
description: Clippy update (rust 1.95.0) surfaced ~72 warnings across the workspace. Categories: manual Range/RangeInclusive::contains (~19), useless_vec (~3), needless_borrow (~4), approx PI/E/TAU constants (~5), unused variables/assignments, useless_conversion, sort_by_key suggestion, manual_div_ceil. All are stylistic / lint-only — no behavioral bugs except a now-fixed always-true assert in lle.rs and a stale assignment in nearest_neighbors.rs (both fixed in #237). Should be addressable mostly via cargo clippy --fix.
